events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: unsupported NM/MC runs are a **fail** (non-compliant, installed-defective) — medium risk since it's correctable pre-closeup but must not be covered until fixed. Cited NEC 334.30 (NM support intervals/12" from boxes), 330.30 (MC equivalent), and 300.4 (physical damage protection through framing).
